zoning_district_source.notes: Per PR #232 spec — 1,937 polygons, layer 'Zoning'. full_zoning carries overlays/suffixes (R1-18 PCD ESL); comparable_zoning is the simplified base. Path A HIGH per orchestrator's 249-row pre-stage (commit 20dacfc). Phase 7B.3 ingest authoritative.

notes: 57-list wealth pocket #1. Per PR #232 risk register: PropertyCity='SCOTTSDALE' bbox FAILS 50% primitive (postal-city noise extends well beyond actual limits). REQUIRES ingest_maricopa_az_city_limits.py prefilter run before Phase 7B.2 per-muni registration. Source: Maricopa County Reference/ParcelCityCounty/MapServer/1 CityName='SCOTTSDALE'. 150,207 parcels expected (raw PropertyCity); post-prefilter count expected lower.

zoning_district_source.notes: Per PR #232 spec — 464 polygons / 427 nonblank ZONECLASS. Bbox primitive PASSES (no prefilter needed). Codes carry descriptive labels (e.g. 'OSP-Open Space Reserve', 'Public School', 'R-10'). Path A simple.

notes: 57-list wealth pocket #2. Bbox PASSES per PR #232 — no prefilter required. 10,071 parcels per PropertyCity='PARADISE VALLEY'. Smaller / cleaner than Scottsdale; second proof candidate.

zoning_district_source.notes: Per PR #262 spec — Cave Creek's public GIS app is parcel-only, not zoning. Per orchestrator's 10-row Path B pre-stage (commit 9af5827) — ordinance/code workflow only. Lane A may need to author per-zone polygons from PDF zoning map if applicable; otherwise rely on orchestrator's matrix-only flip pattern.

notes: 57-list adjacent wealth pocket. Path B LOW per orchestrator. ~5,300 parcels expected. No zoning GIS — defer Phase 7B.3 to ordinance/PDF derived after Scottsdale/Paradise Valley flip.

zoning_district_source.notes: Per orchestrator's 24-row Path B pre-stage (commit 9af5827) — ordinance/PDF source. Lane A discovery during Phase 7B.3 fire may identify a separate ArcGIS publisher; fallback is ordinance-only.

notes: 57-list adjacent wealth pocket. Path B LOW. ~10,400 parcels expected. Largest of the 3 LOW-confidence munis.

zoning_district_source.notes: Per orchestrator's 8-row Path B pre-stage (commit 9af5827) — American Legal / Code Publishing ordinance source. No zoning GIS expected.

notes: 57-list adjacent wealth pocket. Path B LOWEST. ~2,000 parcels expected — smallest in cohort. Likely matrix-only flip via orchestrator's pre-stage; Lane A polygon authoring deferred.
